description_long: This is a life-sized, anatomically accurate adult human figure with a neutral, upright stance and arms slightly extended outward. The body proportions are realistic, with defined musculature and natural curves, suggesting a female form. The head is bald and facial features are minimally detailed, giving a generic and expressionless appearance. The figure is unclothed, with no visible accessories, footwear, or carried objects. The surface is smooth and uniform, with a matte, light gray finish that lacks any visible texture or color variation. The overall form is solid and continuous, with no separable or articulated parts.
description: A realistic, unclothed adult female figure in a neutral standing pose with smooth, matte gray surface and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and legs with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, chest, abdomen, and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back, shoulders, and legs with arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head, torso, and legs from the opposite side.
